title: sida edmondii
intro: Sida edmondii, also known as Cordyceps sinensis, is a type of fungus that grows on certain species of caterpillars in high-altitude regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sida edmondii include enhanced physical performance, improved immune function, and increased energy levels. In herbal preparations, Sida edmondii is often combined with other herbs and is typically available in capsule or powder form.
